<features>
- observable feature: four-legged mammal
- observable feature: fur-covered body
- observable feature: visible ears and snout
- observable feature: standing in grassy field
</features>
<kb>
- IF [four-legged mammal with fur, visible ears and snout, standing in grassy field] THEN [4]
- IF [bird with wings, in flight or perched] THEN [2]
- IF [four-legged amphibian with smooth skin, in green environment] THEN [6]
- IF [four-legged mammal with mane and tail, standing or moving in open field] THEN [7]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the image shows a four-legged mammal with fur, visible ears and snout, standing in a grassy field, which matches the features of class 4.
</rule_check>
<response>4</response>
